articles.title: Labour's Andy Burnham wins a special election, setting up a showdown with Starmer to lead Britain
articles.excerpt: Labour's Andy Burnham, the current mayor of Greater Manchester, has won a special election for a seat in Parliament that puts him in a position to challenge embattled Prime Minister Keir Starmer for leadership of the country.
articles.content: Labour's Andy Burnham, the current mayor of Greater Manchester, has won a special election for a seat in Parliament that puts him in a position to challenge embattled Prime Minister Keir Starmer for leadership of the country.

articles.title: Scottish Conservatives win first Westminster by-election in more than 50 years
